title: Ice Cream Scoop - 3 Pcs Stainless Steel Ice Cream Scoop Trigger Include Small Size（1.57 Inch, Medium Size (1.96 Inch), Large Size (2.36 Inch), Melon Scoop (Cookie Scoop)
features: ✔ WITH ERGONOMIC TRIGGER, SAVE YOUR TIME -- A simple squeeze releases cookie dough, makes scooping cookies a breeze! This perfect scoop glides easily and does not require intense effort. And the grip fits comfortably into left and right hands, save your time and energy!

✔ BUILT TO LAST - Always brand new! Different from other inferior stainless steel, the 18/8 304 stainless steel Ice cream Scoops won't chip or discolor, You can be confident with safety and durability of this kitchen tool. Easy to clean: Dishwasher safe so clean up is no hassle; hand washing recommended to retain glister.

✔ EASY TO OPERATE AND CLEAN: FUKTSYSM Ice Cream Scoop made with the trigger mechanism, each Ice Cream Scoop has an integrated rotating lever for easy release. The innovative cog-and-ratchet scoop with release system (no springs) make these Ice Cream Scoops relieve pressure on wrist and hand. Metal Ice Cream Scoop sturdy stainless steel is durable and long lasting.Polished finish is not only beautiful but also easy to clean.

✔ DISHWASHER SAFE and 3 SIZES - The ice cream scoop set includes small size (scoop diameter: 1.57 inch/4 cm), medium size (scoop diameter: 1.96 inch/5 cm), large size (scoop diameter: 2.36 inch/6 cm). We can use different size scooper for large or small ice-cream, sorbet, fruit, meatballs, cookies, cupcakes, muffins, a great versatile kitchen tool. Dishwasher safe, this cookie dough scoop set retains its gleaming shine wash after wash.

✔ ELEGENT KITCHEN GADGETS - Works great for creating balls of cookie dough, muffin, ice cream, fruit/melon, sorbet, meatballs, mashed potatoes and more; ideal for use at home, in a restaurant or an ice cream parlour, ideal bridal shower, wedding, engagement, anniversary, birthday, hostess and housewarming gifts. Perfect Mother's Day and holiday gifts as well.
description: Product Description Are You Having a Hard Time Scooping Your Ice Cream Out of the Container? The Gleaming 304 Stainless Steel Ice Cream Scoop Are Your Culinary Solution for Elegant Food Preparation and Professional Results. UPGREDE DESIGN SAVE YOUR TIME -- A Simple Squeeze Release Ice Cream Scoop made with the up great design in innovative cog-and-ratchet, each Ice Cream Scoop has an integrated rotating lever for easy release. The new design makes food not easy to stick to stainless steel, and it is easy to clean. Multifunction - Multipurpose Sturdy stainless steel ice cream scoop, use for make beautifully rounded balls of ice cream, fruit, sorbet, melon ball, meatballs, delicious cookies, muffins, cupcakes and many more healthy meals easily. Selected High Quality 304 Stainless Steel Made of high quality 18/8 304 stainless steel, our scoops are not only shiny and smooth but also durable. Every scoop is tested for thousands of times to ensure that they can work for you longer time without breaking or bending easily. 3 Sizes Meet Various Needs Contains small size size (scoop diameter: 1.6 inch/4 CM Ball, capacity: 1.5 Tbsp/ 0.8 OZ ), medium size (scoop diameter: 2 inch/5 CM Ball, capacity: 2.8 Tbsp/ 1.4 OZ ), large size (scoop diameter: 2.4 inch/6 CM Ball, capacity: 5.4 Tbsp/ 2.7 OZ ). Choose what you need size for ice-cream, sorbet, fruit, meatballs, cookies, cupcakes, muffins. Perfect Amazing Kitchen Gift Ideal for use at home, in a restaurant or an ice cream parlor, ideal bridal shower, wedding, engagement, anniversary, birthday, hostess and housewarming gifts. Perfect Mother's Day and holiday gifts as well. How To Do When It Bounce Out? 1. Accessories: Body, Spring, Scoop Scraping 2. Put the Spring in Position of the Hook. 3. Press the scoop scraping shaft into the spoon groove. 4. Snap scoop scraping though the handle section hole first NOTE: Please clean up after using the product. Please do not leave the product in a humid environment. 304 Stainless Steel Ice Cream Scoop with Trigger is Easy to Clean. We Can Hand Wash, and Dishwasher is Also Safe.
